zh.lifeSummary: Margred Verch Ieuan是Ieuan ap Gruffudd  ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth和Gwerful ferch Jenkin的女兒，於1524年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾利納阿爾蒙--拉爾。她於大約1528年與Howel Ap Madoc在威爾士凱爾納方史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世在威爾士丹比爾，埋葬在英國威爾斯丹比爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margred Verch Ieuan是Ieuan ap Gruffudd  ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth和Gwerful ferch Jenkin的女儿，于1524年出生在英国威尔斯丹比爾利納阿爾蒙--拉爾。她于大约1528年与Howel Ap Madoc在威尔士凱爾納方史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世在威尔士丹比爾，埋葬在英国威尔斯丹比爾。

nameMeanings.name: Margred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: Verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: Margred Verch Ieuan was born in 1524, in Llanarmon-yn-lal, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the daughter of Ieuan ap Gruffudd  ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth and Gwerful ferch Jenkin. She married Howel Ap Madoc about 1528, in Caernarfonshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in Denbighshire, Wales, and was buried in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Margred Verch Ieuan est née en 1524, à Llanarmon-yn-lal, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fille de Ieuan ap Gruffudd  ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth et Gwerful ferch Jenkin. Elle a épousé Howel Ap Madoc environ 1528, à Caernarfonshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée à Denbighshire, Galles, et a été enterrée à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Margred Verch Ieuan wurde 1524 in Llanarmon-yn-lal, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Ieuan ap Gruffudd  ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth und Gwerful ferch Jenkin geboren. Sie hat um 1528 in Caernarfonshire, Wales Howel Ap Madoc geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb in Denbighshire, Wales und wurde in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Margred Verch Ieuanは1524年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアラナルモン-イン-ラルでIeuan ap Gruffudd  ap Ieuan ap IorwerthとGwerful ferch Jenkinの娘として生まれた。約1528年にウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアでHowel Ap Madocと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女はウェールズデンビグhシュアイアで死去し，イギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.of,Buellt ctf,Breconshire,Wales: 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르 브레콘 스트 존 테 이반그리스트
ko.lifeSummary: Margred Verch Ieuan(은)는 1524년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 랜아몬-이-라에서 Ieuan ap Gruffudd  ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth(와)과 Gwerful ferch Jenkin의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1528년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 Howel Ap Madoc(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margred Verch Ieuan nasceu em 1524, em Llanarmon-yn-lal, Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom filha de Ieuan ap Gruffudd  ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth e Gwerful ferch Jenkin. Ela casou-se com Howel Ap Madoc aproximadamente 1528, em Caernarfonshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em Denbighshire, Gales, e foi sepultada em Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.of,Buellt ctf,Breconshire,Wales: брекон ст джон т эвангелист, брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Margred Verch Ieuan родилась в 1524 г. в местности лланармон-ин-лаль, денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Ieuan ap Gruffudd  ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth и Gwerful ferch Jenkin. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Howel Ap Madoc около 1528 г. в местности каирнарфоншир, Уэльс. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в местности денбаишир, Уэльс и была похоронена в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Margred Verch Ieuan nació en 1524, en Llanarmon-yn-lal, Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido como hija de Ieuan ap Gruffudd  ap Ieuan ap Iorwerth y Gwerful ferch Jenkin. Se casó con Howel Ap Madoc aproximadamente 1528, en Caernarfonshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en Denbighshire, Gales, y fue sepultada en Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
